name: Plenty Vaporizer
summary: A handheld mains-powered hybrid vaporiser from Storz & Bickel, for powerful home sessions.
description: The Plenty is Storz & Bickel's corded handheld vaporiser, sitting between the portable Mighty and the desktop Volcano. Hybrid convection-and-conduction heating through a large filling chamber and a stainless-steel cooling coil produces dense, cool vapour, with temperature set on an analogue dial. It suits patients who medicate at home and want serious vapour output without managing a battery. It is tethered to the mains and on the bulky side, so it is a home device — but the cooling coil makes for some of the smoothest draws in the range.
